pi_items.source: Task description strictly requires writing the investigation results to 'C:\Workspace\CrashAnalysis\investigation_result.txt'.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly mandate saving the results precisely at 'C:\Workspace\CrashAnalysis\investigation_result.txt'. However, critical task setup and verification scripts (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1), as well as the 'IngestionWorker.dmp' crash dump file itself, are entirely missing from the environment files, rendering the task broken and un-verifiable beyond the instruction text.
